item.name: Horse Chestnut Chest Gear Coffer (IL 515)
item.description:
A wooden chest containing a piece of attire, and possibly some chestnuts if you are lucky. Horses, however, are out of the question.

Required level: 80. IL: 515. Chest gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
